title: Gina connectors.json
description: Database connector declarations for a Gina bundle. Each key is a logical connector name (e.g. "couchbase", "session"); the value describes the connection parameters. Acquired at runtime via getConnection().

connector.description: Connector type override. Required when the key does not match a built-in connector name.

host.description: Hostname or IP address of the database server. Supports comma-separated values for clusters and ${variable} interpolation.

password.description: Authentication password. Supports ${variable} interpolation for secrets.

scope.description: Data isolation scope stamped on every document at insert time and used to filter queries. Falls back to NODE_SCOPE env var when omitted.

ping.description: Interval to ping the cluster and verify connectivity (e.g. "2m", "30s").

pingInterval.description: Alias for ping. Interval to keep the connection alive (e.g. "2m", "30s").

detailed_errcodes.description: When true, exposes detailed Couchbase error codes in error objects instead of generic messages.
